# @json-express/cli — AI Context

Optional scaffolding & developer tooling (bin: `jex`). **Never required to run a server** — the `json-express` bin ships from `@json-express/core`.

## Commands
```
npx jex init [name]        # scaffold a new app: package.json (boot), .env, data/, models/, AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md — no code files
npx jex configure          # interactive plugin selection per category, persisted to .env
npx jex export <collection># generate a typed models/<collection>.ts from existing JSON data
npx jex migrate            # run the active adapter's migrations (Postgres tables, Mongo indexes)
```

## Configuration (.env)
No `jex.*` keys of its own.

## Notes for agents
- Scaffolded apps contain NO application code — do not add an index file to them.
- An interactive preset/manual create flow is planned; today `init` scaffolds the boot default stack.
